/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc  -fPIC -Wall -DGMT_NO_CURL -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.6 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gshhg_version.dir/gshhg_version.c.o -o gshhg_version  /opt/homebrew/lib/libnetcdf.dylib
